name: context-keeper
description: Universal AI memory layer — Claude Code plugin that auto-saves decisions, conventions, and context across sessions

scripts.build:all: cd go && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../plugin/server/bin/context-keeper-darwin-arm64 ./cmd/context-keeper/ && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../plugin/server/bin/context-keeper-darwin-amd64 ./cmd/context-keeper/ && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../plugin/server/bin/context-keeper-linux-amd64 ./cmd/context-keeper/ && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../plugin/server/bin/context-keeper-linux-arm64 ./cmd/context-keeper/ && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../plugin/server/bin/context-keeper-windows-amd64.exe ./cmd/context-keeper/

author: kristiansnts
